content.en:
Ye Tian also had some Eternal Supreme Gold Coins in his hand, which had been exchanged with other Supreme Dao Realm trades over the years.

Moreover, in order to participate in this auction, he also exchanged some precious resources that were not of much help to him, in exchange for hundreds of thousands of eternal gold coins.

Of course, if he doesn't find a suitable auction item, he won't participate in the auction.

Soon.

The auction began.

The Supreme Void has no real auction items, only projections, but after all, this is still an auction held by the elders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and they definitely don't dare to deceive.

And such auctions have been held many times, and many supreme realms are also very relieved.

The first auction item appeared.

【Old Real Gold】

This treasure can be integrated into the will, protecting the will from being disturbed by external forces, and for many Supreme Dao realms, this old real gold is of high value.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't look down on this kind of treasure.

In the end, the old real gold was auctioned off by an eightfold Supreme Dao realm for six hundred eternal gold coins.

Subsequently, one by one, good things were put up for auction.

For example, the sixth sequence of the Dao rule items, there are auctions here, if they are in normal times, they can't be exchanged at all.

Of course, this kind of treasure is not necessarily available at many auctions.

And this sixth-sequence Supreme Dao Rule item attracted a lot of bidding from the Supreme Dao Realm, and the final transaction price reached 6,300 Eternal Solstice Gold Coins.

Gradually, there are a lot of auction items, and it is almost time to reach the finale.

"The next auction item is a Fourth Sequence Supreme Rule item!"

As soon as the auctioneer's voice fell, it attracted the attention of many Dao realms, and even Su Ya was excited.

"The Fourth Sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items are of great use to Elder Gu Yang, will he take them out for auction? Even if there is really a Supreme Dao Realm for auction, it will be taken by Elder Gu Yang privately, and it is impossible to get it for auction!" Su Ya was surprised.

"It should be a fourth-order supreme rule item that is not of high quality and has huge side effects!" Ye Tian guessed.

"Definitely!"

Su Ya affirmed.

In the midst of the expectant gaze of many Dao realms, an item appeared.

[The fourth sequence of the rule item of the Supreme Dao - Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone, medium quality, the side effect is that after refining, it may trigger the sound of Devil May Cry, once touched, the body will die, and in addition, it will also slightly affect the origin and will. 】

As soon as he saw that it was the Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone, the Supreme Dao Realm present scolded him.

"I thought it was a good thing, this is not the Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone, I remember that thirty million years ago to the Dao Era, there was a Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone, which was given by the Dragon Emperor Overlord, I haven't seen the Dragon Emperor Overlord for a long time, this can't be the Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone of the Dragon Emperor Overlord, right?"

"It's really possible that the Dragon Emperor Overlord's Devil May Cry Spider Stone. "

"I don't want this thing for me, and I'll put it up for auction at auction!"

"I can't say that, this is a fourth-sequence Supreme Dao rule item, once refining it doesn't touch the sound of Devil May Cry, you can comprehend the fourth-sequence Supreme Dao rule, and then you can directly stop refining. "

"Whoever dares to bet, once he loses the bet, he will fall. "

At this moment, a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm revealed: "This should be the Devil May Cry Heavenly Spider Stone of the Dragon Emperor Overlord, and I am familiar with the Dragon Emperor Overlord, not long ago, he fell, and he fell in the family retreat, as for how he fell, I can't guess." But after the fall of the Dragon Emperor Overlord, the descendants of his family sold all kinds of treasures, including this Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone. "

"Doesn't this mean that the Dragon Emperor Overlord is refining the Devil May Cry Heavenly Spider Stone?"

"The Dragon Emperor Overlord has been getting this Devil May Cry Spider Stone for a long time, and it should be that after comprehending the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the Perfection Realm, he tried to refine the Devil May Cry Spider Stone, but it fell!"

"It's a pity, the Dragon Emperor Overlord is a Ninefold Dao Realm peak powerhouse, what a strong person, as long as he doesn't encounter great danger, he will hardly die!"

Although these Supreme Dao Realms are very unfavorable to the Devil May Cry Heavenly Spider Stone, I have to say that the Devil May Cry Heavenly Spider Stone contains a very powerful Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, and its value is still there.

Then.

The auctioneer said: "Everyone, the Devil May Cry sound of the Devil May Cry Heavenly Spider Stone is indeed terrifying, but if you find the Heavenly Sound Holy Fruit, you can resist the sound of Devil May Cry." "

"Heavenly Sound Holy Fruit, that kind of treasure is a legendary treasure, and its value is still above the Devil May Cry Heavenly Spider Stone, even if it is a normal Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, it is more than enough!" You Zhi Dao Realm said.

However, the auction went ahead.

Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone, starting price 60,000 eternal gold coins

This starting price is not high at all, and it can even be said that it is very cheap.

It should be the descendants of the Dragon Emperor's overlord in order to accumulate more wealth to cultivate their own clansmen and strengthen their families.

They don't care how much they can sell, they just want to be able to sell.

"61,000 Eternal Gold Coins!

One of the most Daojin competed.

Ye Tian frowned slightly, he really wanted to obtain the Devil May Cry Heavenly Spider Stone, this thing helped him too much, if he won the auction, he could definitely improve the fourth sequence to the realm of Dao rules.

After all, this Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone is very large, and there are many origins of the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules contained inside!

But I didn't expect that with such a big side effect, the Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone, and the Supreme Dao Realm was willing to bid?

"63,000 Eternal Gold Coins!"

Ye Tian opened his mouth to bid.

Su Ya on the side looked at Ye Tian with some surprise, but when she thought that Ye Tian's clone was very special, maybe she was using her clone to refine the Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone.

But under normal circumstances, the will of the doppelganger and the ontology are one, and once the will of the doppelganger is destroyed, the will of the ontology will also be severely damaged, and even leave permanent wounds.

Maybe Ye Tian's clone is too special to avoid this situation.

Otherwise, she couldn't figure out why Ye Tian would bid for the Devil May Cry Sky Spider Stone.

"70,000 Eternal Gold Coins!"

"80,000 Eternal Gold Coins!"

"100,000 Eternal Gold Coins!"

Ye Tian was constantly competing with that Ninefold Dao Realm.

"Little one, do you really want to compete with me?"

That Ninefold Dao Realm summoned Ye Tian.

Ye Tian ignored the other party, and asked Su Ya instead, "Su Domain Lord, who is this Ninefold Dao Realm?"

Su Ya said: "A Ninefold Dao Realm of the Qin clan is also a deacon. It is said that the Qin clan has a Ninefold Dao Realm peak powerhouse whose foundation is seriously damaged, and there is no hope of breaking through. Perhaps it was the one who needed the Devil May Cry Heavenly Bead Stone, if he successfully comprehended the rules of the Fourth Sequence of the Supreme Dao, the Qin Clan would spend a lot of money to repair his foundation and let him break through to the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm. That's why the one will fight, and this one is the heir of the other. "
